scripts.backend:dev: cd apps/backend && uv run uvicorn app:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8123
scripts.backend:test: cd apps/backend && OPENROUTER_API_KEY=dummy uv run pytest -m "not live"
scripts.backend:lint: cd apps/backend && OPENROUTER_API_KEY=dummy uv run ruff check .
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,web,convex -c "blue.bold,green.bold,magenta.bold" "bun run backend:dev" "bun run web:dev" "bun run convex:dev"
scripts.test: bun run backend:test && bun run web:build
